headline: Injured at work Preparation Checklist — Taylorsville
articleBody:
Injured at work Preparation Checklist for Taylorsville Clients

Before your Injured at work appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
